MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Gregory David Brown, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2003 Continued To Oct-16-03 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Gregory David Brown, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Gregory David Brown, Esq., sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 10/16/2003 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Sarah Lerschen, CSR# 6213. (212).

Off Calendar May-15-2003 Set For Trial On Nov-17-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-27-03 At 04:00 P.M. In Dept 624
